The Australian carrots are extremely crunchy.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Peel and slice the carrots
2. Fill pan with 3cm of salt water and boil it
3. Add the carrot slices and continue boiling before reducing the heat and covering the pan
4. Cook until the carrots are tender but not soft
5. This will take about 10 – 15 minutes
metaData.Storage Information:
• To maintain its optimum quality for longer, store the item(s) whole in the fridge
• Best consumed within 21 days of delivery

These indonesian sweet potatoes are long and irregular in shape. It has rough golden-brown skins speckled with petite eyes and root hairs. Their inner flesh is light brown-orange which turns yellow-orange hue when roasted. It is sweet and fluffy and produces a honey sweet syrup glaze when roasted or baked.

Potatoes are very versatile food source and also a staple food in many hosuehold. Typically, many enjoyed it in the form of french fries or potato chips, but it can also be enjoyed healthily.
metaData.Preparation:
• Cooking Directions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (218°C)
2. Rub potatoes with olive oil, sprinkle with salt and pepper and prick them with the tines of a fork
3. Place them on a baking sheet
4. Cook the potatoes for 45 to 60 minutes, until their skin is crispy, and sticking one with a fork to make sure its cooked

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Sweet Potato Purple is an excellent source of dietary fiber, vitamins A & C, and carotenoid anti-oxidants, particularly the anti-aging-carotene. They also supply vitamin B6, manganese, and potassium - perfect for supplementing your diet. The bright purple colour will certainly brighten up any dish (or even on its own) and your day as well. We recommend steaming or cooking them in a soup to enjoy our purple sweet potato with its natural sweetness.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Purple Sweet Potatoes, rinse and scrub thoroughly, then peel if desired. Slice or cube for roasting, or leave whole to bake until tender. Steam or boil for a quick, easy side, or mash for a creamy texture in both sweet and savory recipes. For the best color and flavor, cook gently and enjoy their naturally sweet, vibrant taste.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the vegetables at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 7 days

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Potatoes are rich in vitamins, minerals and antioxidants - making them very healthy. Studies have linked potatoes and their nutrient content to a variety of impressive health benefits, including improved blood sugar control, reduced heart disease risk and higher immunity. Our meaty Thailand potatoes are perfect for fluffy mashed potatoes or any curry dish as they absorb the gravy beautifully. Other recommended cooking methods include boiling, steaming, frying, baking or roasting - suitable in a wide assortment of dishes.
metaData.Preparation: Good Nature Organic Potatoes are rich in vitamins, minerals and antioxidants - making them very healthy. Studies have linked potatoes and their nutrient content to a variety of impressive health benefits, including improved blood sugar control, reduced heart disease risk and higher immunity. Our meaty Thailand potatoes are perfect for fluffy mashed potatoes or any curry dish as they absorb the gravy beautifully. Other recommended cooking methods include boiling, steaming, frying, baking or roasting - suitable in a wide assortment of dishes.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in the bag in a cool, dark and dry place
